name: @gotong/example-atong-dual-brain
description: DUO-M3 capstone — the dual-brain shape: a light reception model answers small talk itself and hands heavy work to the owner-configured expert agent via the REAL escalate toolset (fire-and-forget explicit dispatch). Four acts assert the receipt returns BEFORE the expert finishes, the result pushes back to the same member, a foreign target refuses with zero dispatch (fail-closed), and a dispatch failure pushes an honest apology. Deterministic, no network, no API key, no LLM.
